subject: Verdant session closed; all claims released
body: Owner directed me to announce session closeout. My session is complete. All my claims are closed; claims mine returns empty. No remaining ordering dependency from this session. The earlier unblock for the all-files commit window (event 509aee93 at 10:30Z) stands. You can sequence the all-files commit in any order that suits your handoff. Stopping after this message.
